query_or_notice_scope: Amsterdam market-consultation notice (7 May 2024), reference AICT2023-0161
observable_public_state: The public TenderNed notice 'Dienstverlening Public Cloud' for Gemeente Amsterdam describes a market exploration of Azure partners as strategic cloud partners for the municipality and cites the Amsterdam cloud strategy.
paper_safe_use_now: Supports a stronger bounded statement that Amsterdam has an official same-buyer Azure/Public Cloud procurement-family surface, not just a register-only disclosure surface.
main_claim_ceiling: Do not present this notice as naming ChatAmsterdam, proving that ChatAmsterdam itself was procured through this route, or closing the public-assessment companion gap.
visualization_hook: Procurement-family sidecar; same-buyer Azure strategy bridge
evidence_note: Browser-verified notice text includes TenderNed-kenmerk 466218, reference AICT2023-0161, and market-consultation wording on Azure partners.

query_or_notice_scope: Amsterdam contract notice (19 Dec 2024), reference AICT2023-0161
observable_public_state: The public TenderNed notice states that Gemeente Amsterdam seeks one supplier for municipal Public Cloud dienstverlening, says KPN and dochteronderneming InSpark currently manage the Public Cloud infrastructure, and says about one hundred solutions are hosted on Azure landing zones.
paper_safe_use_now: Supports a reviewer-checkable family-level procurement companion for Amsterdam's broader Azure/Public Cloud environment with stronger operational specificity than the market-consultation notice.
main_claim_ceiling: Do not restate this notice as exact ChatAmsterdam procurement proof, supplier confirmation for the register row itself, or implementation detail for the specific algorithm-register entry.
visualization_hook: Procurement chronology sidecar; same-buyer cloud-infrastructure bridge
evidence_note: Browser-verified notice text includes TenderNed-kenmerk 503203, reference AICT2023-0161, negotiation procedure wording, and Azure landing-zone context.

query_or_notice_scope: Amsterdam award notice (13 Aug 2025), reference AICT2023-0161
observable_public_state: The public TenderNed award-stage notice repeats the municipal Public Cloud/Azure frame, again names KPN and InSpark as current infrastructure managers, and again describes approximately one hundred Azure-hosted municipal solutions plus a sovereign-cloud landing-zone buildout.
paper_safe_use_now: Supports a chronology-safe statement that the Amsterdam Public Cloud procurement family remained publicly visible through award-stage documentation, not only a one-off consultation or tender notice.
main_claim_ceiling: Do not collapse award-stage cloud-family visibility into exact row linkage, supplier proof for ChatAmsterdam itself, or public DPIA/ethical-leaflet inspectability.
visualization_hook: Procurement chronology sidecar; award-stage continuation badge
evidence_note: Browser-verified notice text includes TenderNed-kenmerk 541021, reference AICT2023-0161, and award-stage chronology on the same procurement family.
